entities.child: a child pressing against the glass

scenes.title: The Aquarium
scenes.background_prompt: An aquarium viewing room with a large curved glass tank, blue-tinted lighting, coral decorations inside the tank, and a bench in front. No people, no fish.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An aquarium viewing room with dim blue-tinted lighting. A large curved glass tank takes up the entire wall, filled with clear water and colorful coral formations — pink fans, purple branches, and green anemones. In the center of the tank, a bright orange clownfish with white stripes darts among the anemone tentacles, its vivid color standing out against the blue water. A green sea turtle glides slowly through the upper portion of the tank, its flippers extended gracefully. A young child in a red raincoat presses both palms flat against the glass, face close to the surface, mesmerized by the clownfish. A wooden bench sits behind the child, and informational plaques are mounted on the wall beside the tank.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place clownfish among the anemone tentacles in the center of the tank, darting and vivid orange with white stripes. Place turtle in the upper portion of the tank, gliding with flippers extended. Place child in front of the glass, pressing both palms flat against the surface, face close, mesmerized.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a brown stone-paved floor stretches across the bottom of the scene. A brown wooden bench with a curved back and seat sits in the center, positioned directly in front of a large, curved aquarium tank. To the right of the bench, a child with short brown hair, wearing a green textured sweater, yellow vertically-striped pants, and blue shoes, stands facing the aquarium with both hands pressed against the glass. The aquarium is framed by thick, brown wooden posts and beams. Inside the tank, a clownfish with orange and white stripes and black outlines swims toward the right in the center. Above and to the right of the clownfish, a green turtle with a brown patterned shell swims toward the left. The tank is filled with various types of coral: on the left, there is a tall green branching coral, a smaller green rounded coral, and a cluster of blue tube corals; in the center, there is a yellowish-brown branching coral; on the right, there are tall brown tubular corals, a flat blue and white shelf coral, and rounded green and brown corals. The walls on either side of the tank are yellow and decorated with orange line art of coral and shells. Above the aquarium tank, large windows reveal an outdoor scene under a light blue sky with soft white clouds and visible sunbeams streaming downward. The background features green rolling hills, bushes with small purple and yellow flowers, and a large green tree on the right side. The overall lighting suggests a bright, sunny day.
